sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: State that this SDP defines the software development lifecycle for {device_name_model} (IEC 62304 Class {software_safety_class}) and integrates with the overall Design & Development Plan {ref:RD-001} and Risk Management File {ref:RD-007}.

sections.title: 2. Scope
sections.content: Applies to all software items in {device_name_model} developed or maintained by {company_legal_name}, including SOUP, configurable items and supporting tools.

sections.title: 3. Software Lifecycle Activities (IEC 62304 §5)
sections.section_prompt: For each activity, describe the deliverables, entry/exit criteria, responsible role, and tailoring applied based on the IEC 62304 Class {software_safety_class} safety classification. Be specific.

sections.title: 4. Development Tools, Environments & Standards
sections.ai_rows_prompt: List 8–12 realistic tools/standards for medical-device software development of {device_name_model}: IDE, version control (Git), CI/CD, bug tracker, requirements tool, static analysis, unit test framework, integration test framework, coding standard (MISRA-C / Google C++ / TypeScript strict), IEC 62304, IEC 82304, FDA cybersecurity guidance. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 5. Configuration Management & Problem Resolution
sections.section_prompt: Summarise how software configuration management is performed per {ref:SW-010} and how software problems are tracked and resolved per {ref:SW-011}. Include SOUP control and traceability to {ref:SW-009}.

sections.title: 6. Planned Deliverables & Milestones
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate 5–7 milestones (Plan baseline, Requirements baseline, Architecture baseline, Code complete, V&V complete, Release) with linked deliverables (SW-002..SW-008) and the design review ({ref:RD-004}) that gates each. Return JSON array.
